definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="String" id="bufertext">bufertext</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="controls_if"><mutation elseif="1"></mutation><value name="IF0"><block type="compare_mcitems"><value name="a"><block type="itemstack_to_mcitem"></block></value><value name="b"><block type="mcitem_all"><field name="value">CUSTOM:MagneticBootsItem</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="variables_set_string"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:bufertext</field><value name="VAL"><block type="get_localized_text"><value name="key"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">translation.key.magboots_description_off</field></block></value></block></value></block></statement><value name="IF1"><block type="compare_mcitems"><value name="a"><block type="itemstack_to_mcitem"></block></value><value name="b"><block type="mcitem_all"><field name="value">CUSTOM:MagneticBootsACTIVEItem</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO1"><block type="variables_set_string"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:bufertext</field><value name="VAL"><block type="get_localized_text"><value name="key"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">translation.key.magboots_description_on</field></block></value></block></value></block></statement><next><block type="return_string"><value name="return"><block type="variables_get_string"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:bufertext</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
